2605.06115.title: CrossCult-KIBench: A Benchmark for Cross-Cultural Knowledge Insertion in MLLMs
2605.06115.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), trained primarily on English-centric data, frequently generate culturally inappropriate or misaligned responses in cross-cultural settings. To mitigate this, we introduce the task of cross-cultural knowledge insertion, which focuses on adapting models to specific cultural contexts while preserving their original behavior in other cultures. To facilitate research in this area, we introduce CrossCult-KIBench, a comprehensive evaluation benchmark for assessing both the effectiveness of knowledge insertion and its unintended side effects on non-target cultures. The benchmark includes 9,800 image-grounded cases covering 49 culturally relevant visual scenarios across English, Chinese, and Arabic language-culture groups. It supports evaluation in both single-insert and sequential-insert settings. We also propose Memory-Conditioned Knowledge Insertion (MCKI) as a baseline method. MCKI retrieves relevant cultural knowledge from an external memory using frozen MLLM representations, prepending matched entries as conditional prompts when applicable. Extensive experiments on CrossCult-KIBench reveal that current approaches struggle to balance effective cultural adaptation with behavioral preservation, highlighting a key challenge in developing culturally-aware MLLMs. Our work thus underscores an important research direction for developing more culturally adaptive and responsible MLLMs.
2605.06115.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）主要在以英語為中心的數據上進行訓練，經常在跨文化環境中生成文化不當或不對齊的回應。為了減輕這個問題，我們引入了跨文化知識插入的任務，該任務專注於在保留模型在其他文化中原始行為的同時，將模型適應於特定文化背景。為了促進這一領域的研究，我們推出了CrossCult-KIBench，這是一個全面的評估基準，用於評估知識插入的有效性及其對非目標文化的意外副作用。該基準包括9,800個圖像基礎案例，涵蓋英語、中文和阿拉伯語文化群體中的49個文化相關視覺場景。它支持單次插入和序列插入設置的評估。我們還提出了記憶條件知識插入（MCKI）作為基準方法。MCKI使用凍結的MLLM表示從外部記憶中檢索相關的文化知識，並在適用時將匹配的條目作為條件提示前置。對CrossCult-KIBench的廣泛實驗顯示，當前的方法在有效的文化適應與行為保留之間難以取得平衡，突顯了開發具文化意識的MLLMs的一個關鍵挑戰。因此，我們的工作強調了開發更具文化適應性和負責任的MLLMs的一個重要研究方向。
2605.06115.author: Zhen Zeng et.al.
2605.06115.authors: Zhen Zeng, Leijiang Gu, Feng Li, Jing Yu, Zenglin Shi
